item.title: First reading, referred to Consumer Protection & Business.

item.title: 👍Rory Paine-Donovan - Office of the Insurance Commissioner
item.description: Rory Paine-Donovan signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent Office of the Insurance Commissioner.

item.title: ❓💵Christine Brewer - American Council of Life Insurers
item.description: Christine Brewer signed up to testify Other. They are signed up to represent American Council of Life Insurers. They are a registered lobbyist.

item.title: The House Hot Sheet for Week 4 of the 2026 Legislative Session – Washington State House Democrats

item.title: Rules Committee relieved of further consideration. Placed on second reading.

item.title: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.
item.description: Rules suspended. Placed on Third Reading.

item.title: Third reading, passed; yeas, 94; nays, 0; absent, 0; excused, 4.

item.description: Cathleen MacCaul signed up to testify Pro. They are signed up to represent AARP Washington State.
